stemHtml: What is a difference between satellites used by EGNOS and those used by GPS?

options.a: EGNOS satellites have much shorter orbit times than GPS satellites.
options.b: The signals broadcasted by EGNOS are more prone to multipath effects than GPS signals.
options.c: EGNOS satellites are geostationary and GPS satellites are not.
options.d: The signal format broadcasted by EGNOS differs considerably from GPS signal format.
